error.invalid_base_topic: This is not a valid MQTT topic. Enter the plain topic prefix from the Silla app, without wildcards.
error.mqtt_unavailable: The MQTT integration is not available. Set it up first.
error.no_device: No Prism messages were received on this base topic. Check that the topic matches the one configured in the Silla app and that Prism is online.

discovery_confirm.description: Do you want to set up the discovered Prism {serial}?
discovery_confirm.title: Set up Silla Prism

data_description.base_topic: The MQTT topic prefix Prism publishes to, without a trailing slash.

user.description: Enter the MQTT base topic configured on the Prism (in the Silla app, under the MQTT settings). The default is "prism".
user.title: Connect your Silla Prism
